home.subtitle: CivicPulse AI combines citizen reporting with Google Gemini AI to categorize, summarize, and resolve municipal hazards like broken water pipes, potholes, and critical safety emergencies.
home.howItWorksSub: Advanced AI routing combined with trust-driven community validations.
home.footer: CivicPulse AI. Developed for civic resolution and smart city emergency management.

stats.reportedHazardsDesc: Hazards submitted and tracked by the community
stats.resolvedComplaintsDesc: Verified resolutions and repaired municipal facilities
stats.activeEmergenciesDesc: Critical warnings broadcasted by city administrators

features.step1Desc: Citizens submit reports with pictures and GPS coordinates. Gemini AI compiles user inputs into structured summaries instantly.
features.step2Desc: Our system detects duplicates using distance matrices and semantic comparison, categorizing and routing to correct departments.
features.step3Desc: Admins assign, verify, and resolve issues, while publishing high-priority safety alert banners for urgent community warnings.

auth.joinNetwork: Join your local community resolution network
auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to submit and track civic hazards
auth.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign In
auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign Up
auth.authFailed: Failed to authenticate. Please check your credentials.

dashboard.title: Community Issues Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Review, support, and track local civic resolution progress.
dashboard.noResults: No issues match your filter criteria.

alerts.title: Emergency Broadcast Center
alerts.subtitle: Official verified local crisis alerts and active municipal safety warnings.
alerts.allNormalDesc: There are currently no active emergency alerts or crisis warning broadcasts in your area.

map.subtitle: Visualize nearby hazards and hot spots in real-time.
map.showingPins: Showing {count} public pins based on filters.
map.geoNotSupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
map.geoFailed: Failed to access your location. Please check browser permissions.

profile.authRequiredDesc: Please sign in to access your profile and settings.
profile.noReports: You have not submitted any civic reports yet.

report.notFoundDesc: The issue report you are looking for does not exist or has been deleted.
report.validationDesc: Confirm this issue to prioritize it in municipal routing queues.
report.commentPlaceholder: Provide additional details or local status updates...
report.signInToComment: Sign in to add a status update comment.
report.noComments: No comments or validation notes submitted yet.
report.reportCreated: Report created and analyzed by AI.

newReport.title: Report a Local Hazard
newReport.subtitle: Provide coordinates, pictures, and details of the civic issue.
newReport.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Water Main Leak causing street flooding
newReport.descPlaceholder: Provide details about the issue size, hazard potential, and duration...
newReport.aiPreviewSub: Review the AI summary, classification, and safety instructions before submitting.
newReport.duplicateDesc: A report matching this description has been flagged within 100 meters. Submitting this will add your details as a community confirmation to report #{id}.
newReport.geoNotSupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
newReport.geoFailed: Failed to fetch GPS coordinates. Please grant location permissions.
